title: Modernize legacy UI5 after SEGW to RAP
subtitle: VS Code replay showing how ARC-1 anchors a UI5 TypeScript or Fiori Elements migration in the generated RAP service.
outcome: A UI migration plan tied to the real RAP service binding, projection entities, and legacy SEGW behavior.

start.text: The backend migration created ZUI_DM_PROJECTS_O4. Show how the legacy UI5 app maps to either Fiori Elements or a TypeScript freestyle app.

panel.title: Legacy UI5 scan
panel.body: The app is a UI5 1.84 freestyle JavaScript master-detail app. It uses a hardcoded OData V2 model, ProjectSet -> Tasks navigation, Task -> TimeEntries navigation, and a function import ApproveProject.

srvb.summary: ARC-1 reads the V4 service binding that the UI migration must target.

projection.summary: The replay reads the projection fields and association names before designing UI bindings.
projection.result: Fields: ProjectId, Name, Customer, Status, TotalBudget, Criticality. Associations: _Tasks. Actions exposed by behavior: approve_project.

legacy-action.summary: ARC-1 reads the old function-import behavior so the UI action is not guessed from the UI code alone.
legacy-action.result: Legacy ApproveProject(ProjectId) validates status = DRAFT, updates ZDM_PROJECT-STATUS = APPROVED, and commits directly.

panel.title: Action migration mapping
panel.body: The V2 function import maps to the RAP bound action approve_project. The UI must call the V4 bound action, not recreate the old function-import URL.

decision.prompt: Which UI target should the replay show?

options.label: Fiori Elements
options.description: Use annotations and a generated LROP app when the UX is standard CRUD.

options.label: UI5 TypeScript
options.description: Use a freestyle TypeScript app when custom interaction stays important.

panel.title: Fiori Elements plan
panel.body: Backend first: write @UI.HeaderInfo, @UI.LineItem, @UI.Facet, @Search, and action annotations to the RAP projections, activate them, republish the service binding, then let the Fiori MCP generator read the annotated metadata.

items.label: Custom code
items.value: Only extensions for behavior not covered by annotations

panel.title: UI5 TypeScript plan
panel.body: Freestyle path: scaffold UI5 1.147 TypeScript, move the OData V4 model into manifest.json, replace ProjectSet/Tasks bindings with Project/_Tasks, and replace the old function import with a V4 bound action execution.

items.label: Validation
items.value: Typecheck, UI5 linter, manifest validation, browser smoke

done.text: This modernization scenario is valuable because ARC-1 keeps the UI migration anchored in the live RAP service contract instead of treating UI5 as a detached frontend rewrite.
